"Construction and maintenance of projects relating to water supply, irrigation, sanitation and
sewerage systems and pipe manufacturing."

The Indian Hume Pipe Company Limited is in business of manufacturing, laying and jointing pipelines. The Company has also been undertaking infrastructure development programme by way of execution on turnkey basis i.e. construction (EPC Contract) and maintenance of project relating to water supply, irrigation, sanitation and sewerage systems. The Company also manufacture and supplies Railway sleepers to Indian Railways. The Company's customers are Central Government, State Governments and Local bodies.

The Company places a strong emphasis on upholding and protecting human rights in all aspects of its operations. It actively promote diversity, inclusivity, and equality within our workforce, fostering a culture that values and respects the rights of every individual. It engages in fair and ethical labour practices, providing the employees with safe working conditions, fair wages, and opportunities for professional growth.
Through ongoing stakeholder engagement, continuously strive to identify and address any potential human rights risks, aiming to create a positive and responsible impact on the communities it operate in.
